cases.description: Last Crossing Edge Age: forces the main output to zero, so coarse compilation passes but behavioral stimulus points fail.
Last Crossing Edge Age: keeps the main datapath plausible while reporting the wrong metric value.
Last Crossing Edge Age: mishandles reset or initialization, passing steady-state samples but failing startup or recovery checks.
Last Crossing Edge Age: uses a shifted or inverted decision condition that can pass one mode but fails boundary cases.
Last Crossing Edge Age: updates on the wrong edge or event, so simple static samples pass but timed checks fail.
